MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michaela Lang, Defendant Propria Persona (415) 332-2761
Chanler M. Sparler, Esq. (415) 456-8500 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Worlmind Media, LLC
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT MIKI LANG'S For Change Of Venue (Marin County) is GRANTED; reasonable attorney fees are awarded according to proof. Sanctions are not awarded. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT MIKI LANG'S Motion For Change Of Venue And Sanctions: Opposition was filed late on 07/13/04.
